summary: BLOCK 592 Unofficial Record Compliance - All features verified. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All unofficial pill badges, disclaimer, and compliance checkbox working correctly. Fixed 1 bug: is_unofficial URL param not passed when creating listing from record detail page.

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Missing is_unofficial param in URL when navigating to listing creation from record detail page
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added &is_unofficial=${record.is_unofficial ? 'true' : ''} to List for Sale and Offer to Trade button URLs

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: is_unofficial not parsed from URL params when building selectedRelease object
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added parsing of is_unofficial URL param and included it in setSelectedRelease object

seed_data_creation: Used existing test record: cdd4fe7d-5cf1-4e40-b2f9-faec1600545c (Pink Pony Club by Chappell Roan, is_unofficial=true)
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK 592 Phase 1 features fully implemented and tested. Unofficial record (Pink Pony Club) has is_unofficial=true in MongoDB. All API endpoints return is_unofficial field. Listing creation enforces unofficial_acknowledged=true for unofficial records. UI shows steel gray UNOFFICIAL pills on album art overlay and inline in metadata badges, plus legal disclaimer.

backend: GET /api/records returns is_unofficial field for all records
GET /api/records/{record_id} returns is_unofficial: true for test record
POST /api/listings with is_unofficial: true and unofficial_acknowledged: false returns 400
POST /api/listings with is_unofficial: true and unofficial_acknowledged: true succeeds
POST /api/discogs/update-import-intent works for LATER, DECLINED, CONNECTED, PENDING
frontend: Record detail page shows 'UNOFFICIAL' pill on album art overlay
Record detail page shows inline 'UNOFFICIAL' pill in metadata badges
Record detail page shows legal disclaimer starting with 'NOTICE: This release is identified as Unofficial'
Collection grid shows unofficial pill on record cards for unofficial records
Listing creation form shows tiered compliance checkbox when listing unofficial record
Auto-pricing disabled notice shows for unofficial releases
